name: Aetho Grym
description: A tall human man of Drune affiliation, encountered at the Golokstone. Shaved head, brass nose ring, dark cloak, curved dagger. He accompanied small figures made of sticks and wore a bracelet of bone carved with mushroom shapes.
notes: Warned the party that the Golokstone is the domain of the Drune alone, and that mortals and fairies must leave and never return.
Accompanied by small stick figures in the manner of a retinue.
Bone bracelet carved with mushroom imagery.
